name: Spicy Whole Mung (or Lentil) Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup Mung beans or lentils, dry
1 tablespoon Sea salt or rock salt
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans overnight.
2. Drain them and cook with 6 cups of water in a pressure cooker for 20 minutes, or until quite soft. Alternatively, without using a pressure cooker, soak the beans for at least 2 to 3 hours, rinse, then place in a large pot with 9 cups of water and cook for 40 to 50 minutes, or until quite soft.
3. In a small frying pan, heat oil. Add mustard and cumin seeds. When the mustard seeds pop, add turmeric, then add the warmed spices to the cooked beans. Add all remaining ingredients and mix well.
4. Cook over medium heat for 15 minutes.
5. Serve over basmati rice.
